component: <specific file, skill, script, test, config, or memory layer>
before_evidence: <proof bundle, evaluator result, user correction, rollout, or observation showing old harness behavior>
after_evidence: <proof bundle, check, evaluator result, rollout, or observation showing behavior after the harness change; leave empty while pending>
evidence: <failure, repeated behavior, proof bundle, evaluator result, rollout, or user correction that motivated the change>
root_cause: <why the old harness produced or allowed the failure>
why_this_component: <why this component level owns the fix over prompt, skill, script, docs, test, config, or memory alternatives>
targeted_fix: <what this change is expected to make the agent do differently>
expected_fix: <future behavior or check expected to improve>
observability_signal: <component|experience|decision signal this change expects to improve>
predicted_fixes: <task, proof, behavior, or failure class expected to improve>
predicted_regressions: <task, proof, behavior, safety rule, or workflow that might get worse>
held_out_checks: <regression check not directly used to design the change>
rollback_plan: <how to revert or neutralize this change if verification or later evidence regresses>
verification: <test, lint, rollout, proof bundle, evaluator result, or review evidence>
verdict_basis: <why verdict is accepted, rejected, rollback, or still pending>
